to inherit a fortune.description: One of the oldest reasons to murder, right after God liking your brother's sacrifice more.

to escape blackmail.description: Blackmail can be very profitable, but all profits come with risks.

to hide an affair.description: You never know who might be having an affair these days.

to silence a witness.description: What did they see? Were they worth being killed over it?

to rob the victim.description: Maybe they a had a really expensive diamond on them? Or a cool hat.

to see what it felt like to kill.description: Uh-oh. This is definitely one of the creepiest motives.

to rage with jealousy.description: Logico has seen all sorts. He has seen someone be killed over a bagel.

to fight for the revolution.description: Power to the people! But first, power to this one particular warlord.

to eliminate a spy.description: Anybody could be a spy. And anybody might want to kill a spy. So anybody might want to kill anybody.

for the Church.description: Don't worry: the victim will be considered (in many ways) a martyr.

to break into the Industry.description: People will do anything to break into the Industry. Even kill? Especially kill.

to win an argument.description: Sometimes there is only one surefire way to win an argument.
